title: atractylis chinensis f. simplicifolia
intro: Atractylis chinensis f. simplicifolia, also known as Chinese thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Atractylis chinensis f. simplicifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and potentially exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures.
